flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Finger Lakes Community College rose 25% between 2021 and 2024 ($6.7k → $8.4k).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion fell 6 pp at Finger Lakes Community College vs the 2003–2007 baseline (28.0% vs 33.9%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Finger Lakes Community College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (4.6% → 0.0%).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Finger Lakes Community College rose 14% between 2021 and 2024 (47.0% → 53.4%).
